articles.author: Nathan Bomey
articles.title: Chips sector bloodbath drags Nasdaq down 4.2% - Axios
articles.description: Tech stocks plunged Friday amid rising bond yields, dragging down the Nasdaq in its worst session in 14 months.
articles.content: Zoom in: The Nasdaq plummeted 4.2% Friday, its worst session in 14 months, after a stronger-than-expected May jobs report triggered the jump in yields which would make it more expensive for AI compan… [+1743 chars]
